productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Casual Black Shoes
description: These unique numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, cushioning, bold stitch detailing and minimalist design highlights create an impact of their own. Perfect additions to your wardrobe, these sneakers elevate any casual outfit and give it a real trendy feel. Wear them confidently with your jeans the next time you go out with friends and enjoy the attention.Upper Textured synthetic leather upper for durability, comfort and style Stitched synthetic overlays for midfoot support Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Synthetic leather tongue for midfoot comfort Printed branding on tongue for style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort Cambrelle lining for breathability Outsole Durable rubber outsole in ridged pattern for maximum traction and grip shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
